title: Ioclias
description: A simple mod added a few kinds of new material for minecraft.
body:
Welcome to **Ioclias** Mod!

You can see and support author in **Bilibili** : [https://b23.tv/9ufyjhC](https://b23.tv/9ufyjhC)

This mod added a few functional and ornamental material which can be used to craft Tools and Weapons.

Here is the ores you can see in this mod.
![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I9TTuBKR/images/6b5c0c2a11e18eb39a8b4b8433c234f0d5d8b829.png)

* Amethyst Ore:
**Amethyst Ore** can spontaneous generate at y-60 to y0. Only can be destoryed with Netherite Pickaxe. The tools crafted with amethyst have a faster digging speed than netherite. But it's durability is less than diamond tools.

* Glow Ore:
**Glow Ore** can be found in nether. And it generate on top of the nether (y85 to y125). The tools made with it have the fastest digging speed and the most durability in this mod. But its mining level is lower than diamond tools.

* Shadow Ore:
**Shadow Ore** is rare. Only can be found at the bottom of the end island (y0 to y15). So it is really hard to get it. Please prepare elytra before you go mining.

**Future Plans**:
I will create more types of material, tools ,armors, even mechines and wands in the future.
